steps.title: Understand the function notation
steps.content:
In the function $f(x) = 70(1.04)^x$:
  • $x$ = years after Sonia purchased the vase
  • $f(x)$ = predicted vase value in dollars
Therefore, $f(6)$ represents the predicted value 6 years after purchase.

steps.title: Interpret the given statement
steps.content:
The statement $f(6)$ is approximately equal to 89 means: 6 years after Sonia purchased the vase, the predicted value is approximately 89 dollars.

That matches choice D, so D is correct.
